description: Update checking and upgrade logic for zchat and channel-server packages (update.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: load_update_state
key_interfaces.description: Load update state from JSON file, returns defaults if missing

key_interfaces.name: save_update_state
key_interfaces.description: Save update state to JSON file

key_interfaces.name: should_check_today
key_interfaces.description: Return True if no update check has been done today (UTC date comparison)

key_interfaces.name: check_for_updates
key_interfaces.description: Check remote versions (git ls-remote for main/dev, PyPI for release) and update state

key_interfaces.name: run_upgrade
key_interfaces.description: Run uv tool install --force for both packages. Atomic: rolls back first if second fails.

key_interfaces.name: _check_remote_git
key_interfaces.description: Get latest commit hash (7 chars) from git remote

key_interfaces.name: _check_remote_pypi
key_interfaces.description: Get latest version from PyPI JSON API

key_interfaces.name: _build_install_args
key_interfaces.description: Build uv tool install package specs for given channel (main/dev: git, release: PyPI)

key_interfaces.name: _background_check_main
key_interfaces.description: Entry point for background update check subprocess

user_flows.name: daily update check
steps: if channel is main/dev: git ls-remote for zchat + channel-server repos
if channel is release: query PyPI JSON API for both packages
set installed_ref to remote_ref if first check
set update_available flag if refs differ

user_flows.name: run upgrade
steps: build package specs based on channel
uv tool install --force for each spec
if any fails, roll back previously installed specs
